claim.observation: The FTK Imager acquisition log for surface_physical records: Case Number: 20161104; Evidence Number: 20161104-HD001; Unique description: Surface 3; Examiner: Ovie Carroll; Notes: Live Physical; Drive Model: Samsung MDGAGC; and reports the acquisition MD5 checksum 4032d556cc866c23f1e797410e95603c as 'verified' after image verification.
claim.interpretation: This evidence set is a forensically acquired physical disk image of a Microsoft Surface 3 device, captured live with AccessData FTK Imager under case 20161104 by examiner Ovie Carroll. The matching computed/verification MD5 indicates the image segments verified intact at acquisition time. This establishes provenance and integrity of the image surface only; it says nothing about the system's contents or any activity on it.
